tool_name: Hollow Section (RHS/SHS/CHS) Beam-Column — Combined Axial + Bending Interaction Check

inputs.name: Hollow Section Type
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 — Nominal/material selection, no measurement uncertainty

inputs.name: Factored Axial Load (N_Ed / P_u)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 376:2011 §5 — Class 1 force transducer: ±1% of applied force

inputs.name: Cross-Sectional Area (A)
inputs.note: From CIDECT/manufacturer tables: RHS 200×100×8 → A=4448 mm²; SHS 150×150×8 → A=4448 mm²

inputs.name: Plastic Section Modulus About Bending Axis (W_pl,y)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 21748:2017 §7.3 — Default Type B: ±5% for unclassified parameters

inputs.name: Second Moment of Area About Bending Axis (I_y)
Steel Yield Strength (f_y)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 — Nominal/material selection, no measurement uncertainty

inputs.name: Radius of Gyration About Bending Axis (i_y)

formulas: NRd_kn = A_mm2 * fy_mpa / (1.0 * 1000)  // [kN] — Compression Resistance (N_Rd) — Ref: EC3 §6.2.4 — N_c,Rd = A·f_y/γ_M0; γ_M0=1.0; CHS/RHS Class 1/2 cross-section

lambda_bar = (L_eff_m * 1000 / i_y_mm) / (Math.PI * Math.sqrt(210000 / fy_mpa)); phi_buck = 0.5 * (1 + 0.21 * (lambda_bar - 0.2) + Math.pow(lambda_bar, 2)); chi = Math.min(1.0, 1 / (phi_buck + Math.sqrt(Math.pow(phi_buck, 2) - Math.pow(lambda_bar, 2))))  // Non-Dimensional Slenderness (λ̄) & Buckling Reduction (χ) — Ref: EC3 §6.3.1.2 — λ̄ = (L_cr/i)/(π√(E/f_y)); buckling curve 'a' (α=0.21) for hollow sections
NbRd_kn = chi * A_mm2 * fy_mpa / 1000  // [kN] — Flexural Buckling Resistance (N_b,Rd) — Ref: EC3 §6.3.1.1 — N_b,Rd = χ·A·f_y/γ_M1; γ_M1=1.0
MRd_knm = Wpl_y_cm3 * 1e3 * fy_mpa / 1e6  // [kN·m] — Moment Resistance (M_Rd) — Ref: EC3 §6.2.5 — M_pl,Rd = W_pl,y·f_y/γ_M0; Class 1/2 section

k_yy = 1 + (lambda_bar - 0.2) * N_Ed_kn / NbRd_kn; k_yy = Math.min(k_yy, 1.0 + 0.8 * N_Ed_kn / NbRd_kn); UC_6_61 = N_Ed_kn / NbRd_kn + k_yy * M_Ed_knm / MRd_knm  // EC3 Combined Interaction Check (Eq.6.61 / 6.62) — Ref: EC3 §6.3.3 Eq.(6.61) — N_Ed/N_b,Rd + k_yy·M_y,Ed/M_y,Rd ≤ 1.0
UC_cross = N_Ed_kn / NRd_kn + M_Ed_knm / MRd_knm  // Cross-Section Check (Eq.6.31) — Local Plasticity — Ref: EC3 §6.2.9.1 simplified: N_Ed/N_c,Rd + M_Ed/M_Rd ≤ 1.0 for Class 1/2; conservative

rules.message: Beam-column interaction check failed (EC3 Eq.6.61 > 1.0) — increase section size, reduce effective length, or reduce applied loads
Cross-section combined loading check failed — section yields locally; use plastic moment capacity only if section is Class 1
Non-dimensional slenderness > 2.0: highly slender — buckling governs heavily; N_b,Rd < 0.25·N_Rd; intermediate bracing strongly recommended

smart_warnings.message: Utilisation ratio > 90%: minimal safety reserve — verify load combinations include all accidental and wind/seismic actions; do not proceed without structural engineer sign-off
High axial + moderate moment: k_yy amplification significant — consider moment connection detail to reduce effective eccentricity
Slender CHS column: LTB does not apply for CHS — only flexural buckling governs; CHS advantage over open sections is fully realised here
Long column in S235: consider S355 to reduce section size — same χ at lower weight for slenderness-governed design
Buckling factor χ < 0.5: more than 50% of section capacity lost to buckling — verify effective length assumptions; pinned connections often provide partial restraint; consider intermediate bracing

fmea.effect: Beam-column interaction check failed (EC3 Eq.6.61 > 1.0) — increase section size, reduce effective length, or reduce applied loads
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Cross-section combined loading check failed — section yields locally; use plastic moment capacity only if section is Class 1
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Non-dimensional slenderness > 2.0: highly slender — buckling governs heavily; N_b,Rd < 0.25·N_Rd; intermediate bracing strongly recommended

fmea.failureMode: Utilisation ratio > 90%: minimal safety reserve — verify load combinations include all accidental and wind/seismic actions; do not proceed without structural engineer sign-off
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: UC_6_61 > 0.90 || UC_cross > 0.90

fmea.failureMode: High axial + moderate moment: k_yy amplification significant — consider moment connection detail to reduce effective eccentricity
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: N_Ed_kn > NbRd_kn * 0.7 && M_Ed_knm > MRd_knm * 0.3

fmea.failureMode: Slender CHS column: LTB does not apply for CHS — only flexural buckling governs; CHS advantage over open sections is fully realised here
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: lambda_bar > 1.5 && section_type === 'CHS'

fmea.failureMode: Long column in S235: consider S355 to reduce section size — same χ at lower weight for slenderness-governed design
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: L_eff_m > 8 && fy_mpa === 235

fmea.failureMode: Buckling factor χ < 0.5: more than 50% of section capacity lost to buckling — verify effective length assumptions; pinned connections often provide partial restraint; consider intermediate bracing
